ModuleName: SQL Fundamentals: Queries, Filtering, and Sorting

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured outline of the module's four topic areas — SQL and relational databases, SELECT queries, WHERE filtering, and ORDER BY sorting — used by instructors to organize content and by learners to preview what the module covers.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: An overview page listing all module topics — covering SQL basics, SELECT queries, WHERE filtering, ORDER BY sorting, LIMIT, and applying SQL to business questions — that learners and instructors use as a navigational outline of the module's content.

Artifacts.Name: SQL_Fundamentals_Queries_generated.pptx
Artifacts.Description: A slide deck introducing SQL fundamentals, including database concepts, SELECT syntax, primary keys, and table relationships, intended for use in lectures or self-paced study to walk learners through core query-writing skills.

Artifacts.Name: Introduction to SQL and Relational Databases
Artifacts.Description: A reading that introduces SQL's history, purpose, and the structure of relational databases (tables, rows, and columns), intended for learners to build foundational understanding before writing queries.

Artifacts.Name: Writing Basic SELECT Queries
Artifacts.Description: A reading explaining how to construct SELECT statements to retrieve data from a database, covering syntax and column selection, which learners read before moving on to filtering and sorting.

Artifacts.Name: Filtering Data with WHERE
Artifacts.Description: A reading covering the WHERE clause and how it is used to filter query results by specified conditions, helping learners practice narrowing down large datasets to relevant rows.

Artifacts.Name: Sorting Results with ORDER BY
Artifacts.Description: A reading explaining the ORDER BY clause and how it controls the sort order of query results in ascending or descending sequence, which learners use to understand how to organize returned data meaningfully.

Artifacts.Name: Limiting Output with LIMIT
Artifacts.Description: A reading covering the LIMIT clause and how it restricts the number of rows a query returns, helping learners understand how to improve performance and preview data from large tables.

Artifacts.Name: Applying SQL to Business Questions
Artifacts.Description: A reading that walks learners through translating real-world business questions into working SQL queries by mapping analytical intent onto SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT syntax.

Artifacts.Name: Applying SQL to Business Questions
Artifacts.Description: A duplicate of the 'Applying SQL to Business Questions' reading that walks learners through translating real-world business questions into working SQL queries by mapping analytical intent onto SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT syntax.

Artifacts.Name: Quiz Question Bank (20 questions)
Artifacts.Description: A 20-question quiz bank covering SQL acronym meaning, relational database history, primary keys, row terminology, and the SELECT statement, used by instructors to assess learners' understanding of foundational SQL concepts.
